sentences.target: Je me coupe l'index en cuisinant.

translations.fr: Je me coupe l'index en cuisinant.
translations.en: I cut my index finger while cooking.
translations.es: Me corto el dedo índice mientras cocino.
translations.de: Ich schneide mir beim Kochen den Zeigefinger.
translations.zh-Hans: 做饭时我把食指割伤了。
translations.yue: 煮嘢食時我割損咗食指。
translations.ru: Я порезал указательный палец, когда готовил.
translations.pt: Cortei o dedo indicador enquanto cozinhava.
translations.he: חתכתי את אצבע המורה בזמן שבישלתי.
translations.vi: Tôi bị đứt ngón trỏ khi đang nấu ăn.
translations.nl: Ik sneed mijn wijsvinger tijdens het koken.
translations.uk: Я порізав вказівний палець, коли готував.
translations.hi: खाना बनाते समय मेरी तर्जनी कट गई।
translations.pl: Przeciąłem sobie palec wskazujący podczas gotowania.
translations.el: Έκοψα τον δείκτη μου ενώ μαγείρευα.
translations.nb: Jeg skar meg i pekefingeren mens jeg lagde mat.
translations.sv: Jag skar mig i pekfingret när jag lagade mat.
translations.ro: Mi-am tăiat degetul arătător în timp ce găteam.
translations.cs: Při vaření jsem si řízl do ukazováčku.
translations.da: Jeg skar mig i pegefingeren, mens jeg lavede mad.
translations.ja: 料理中に人差し指を切ってしまった。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; marks the agent of the action.
Clitic reflexive pronoun (1SG), object of 'se couper'; indicates the subject is also the patient.
Main finite verb (present indicative, 1SG) expressing the cutting action.
Definite noun phrase with elided article (l' + index); direct object referring to the index finger.
Preposition introducing a gérondif, expressing simultaneity.
Present participle (gérondif) complementing 'en'; adverbial clause of manner/time.

sentences.target: Tu montres le chemin avec ton index.
sentences.reading: /ty mɔ̃tʁ lə ʃəmɛ̃ avɛk tɔ̃ ɛ̃.dɛks/

translations.fr: Tu montres le chemin avec ton index.
translations.ipa: /ty mɔ̃tʁ lə ʃəmɛ̃ avɛk tɔ̃ ɛ̃.dɛks/
translations.en: You're pointing the way with your index finger.
translations.es: Señalas el camino con el dedo índice.
translations.de: Du zeigst den Weg mit deinem Zeigefinger.
translations.pt: Você aponta o caminho com o dedo indicador.
translations.he: אתה מצביע על הדרך עם האצבע המורה.
translations.vi: Bạn đang chỉ đường bằng ngón trỏ.
translations.ar: أنت تشير إلى الطريق بإصبع السبّابة.
translations.nl: Je wijst de weg met je wijsvinger.
translations.hi: तुम तर्जनी से रास्ता दिखा रहे हो.
translations.el: Δείχνεις τον δρόμο με τον δείκτη σου.
translations.nb: Du peker ut veien med pekefingeren.
translations.id: Kamu menunjukkan jalan dengan jari telunjuk.
translations.ja: あなたは人差し指で道を指している。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 2nd person singular.
Main finite verb (present indicative, 2SG) meaning 'to show'.
Definite article (masc sg) determining 'chemin'.
Common noun serving as the direct object of 'montres'.
Preposition introducing an instrumental complement.
Possessive determiner (2SG, masc sg) modifying 'index'.
Noun; object within the prepositional phrase 'avec ton index'; refers to the finger.

translations.en: We're looking at the book's index.
translations.es: Estamos mirando el índice del libro.
translations.de: Wir schauen ins Register des Buches.
translations.pt: Estamos consultando o índice do livro.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang xem mục lục tra cứu của cuốn sách.
translations.nl: We kijken in het register van het boek.
translations.hi: हम किताब की अनुक्रमणिका देख रहे हैं।
translations.nb: Vi ser i registeret i boken.
translations.ja: 本の索引を見ています。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (impersonal/collective).
Main finite verb (present indicative, 3SG).
Definite noun phrase with elided article; direct object, here meaning the book's index.
Prepositional contraction of 'de + le' meaning 'of the'; introduces a noun complement.
Noun; complement of 'du', specifying the possessor/source.

sentences.target: Pose ton index ici pour déverrouiller.

translations.fr: Pose ton index ici pour déverrouiller.
translations.en: Put your index finger here to unlock.
translations.es: Pon tu dedo índice aquí para desbloquear.
translations.de: Leg deinen Zeigefinger hierhin, um zu entsperren.
translations.it: Metti qui il tuo indice per sbloccare.
translations.yue: 將食指放喺呢度即可解鎖。
translations.ru: Приложи сюда указательный палец, чтобы разблокировать.
translations.pt: Coloque o dedo indicador aqui para desbloquear.
translations.he: הנח כאן את האצבע המורה כדי לבטל את הנעילה.
translations.tr: Kilit açmak için işaret parmağını buraya yerleştir.
translations.vi: Đặt ngón trỏ của bạn vào đây để mở khóa.
translations.nl: Leg je wijsvinger hier om te ontgrendelen.
translations.uk: Поклади тут вказівний палець, щоб розблокувати.
translations.hu: Tedd ide a mutatóujjadat a feloldáshoz.
translations.hi: अनलॉक करने के लिए यहाँ अपनी तर्जनी रखें.
translations.pl: Połóż tutaj palec wskazujący, aby odblokować.
translations.el: Βάλε εδώ τον δείκτη σου για να ξεκλειδώσεις.
translations.nb: Leg pekefingeren din her for å låse opp.
translations.id: Letakkan jari telunjukmu di sini untuk membuka kunci.
translations.sv: Lägg pekfingret här för att låsa upp.
translations.ro: Pune-ți aici degetul arătător ca să deblochezi.
translations.da: Læg din pegefinger her for at låse op.
translations.ja: ロックを解除するにはここに人差し指を置いてください。

tokens.explanation: Imperative verb (2SG) issuing a command.
Possessive determiner (2SG, masc sg) modifying 'index'.
Noun; direct object of 'Pose'.
Adverb of place specifying location.
Preposition introducing a purpose clause.
Infinitive verb complementing 'pour' to express purpose ('to unlock').
